title: Melty Venezuelan Cheese Empanadas
description: A funky and velvety Venezuelan dish featuring beurre noisette, en croute, and egg free friendly ingredients, this crowd pleaser is sure to delight, with a crispy exterior giving way to a gooey cheese center.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, salt, and pepper.
Add cold butter to the bowl and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture.
Gradually add water to the bowl, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of queso fresco and a sprinkle of mozzarella cheese in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the empanadas for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
